title: ActionPlan
description: An action plan created to address survey findings

plan_id.description: Unique identifier for the action plan

survey_id.description: Survey this action plan relates to

description.description: Detailed description of the planned actions
description.example: Increase frequency of team meetings and transparency

status.description: Current status of the action plan

owner.description: Name of the action plan owner

due_date.description: Target completion date for the action plan

created_at.description: Timestamp when the action plan was created
